description: Feature Specification: JSON-Primary Deprecation — reclassify dynamic capture as recovery-only, implement JSON-primary save contract

decisions.title: Drop dynamic capture, adopt JSON-primary mode
decisions.chosen: Option 2: JSON-primary, dynamic capture as recovery-only
decisions.rationale: AI has strictly better information about its own session than any DB query. 39 agent dispatches + 8 deep-research iterations could not fix the fundamental session-selection heuristic problem. Wrong-session capture happened in production.
